claim.title: Narrated Record & Replay product fitness is not yet proven

reason: Harness Ultragoal 0.0.10 requires Product Fitness proof separate from Product Cohesion. The repo has not yet produced a real audience/job/context/outcome quality-in-use receipt.
required_follow_up: Define the concrete product claim and target audience.
Run or inspect real user evidence for the critical narrated capture journey.
Generate a schema-valid Product Fitness receipt with quality-in-use, accessibility, cognitive-load, recovery, and claim-ceiling evidence.
